candidates.why_fit: Ask operators to share their current bottleneck or handoff failure.
candidates.text:
Most SMBs do not have a lead problem. They have a systems problem.

Growth feels random and non-repeatable.

The fix is almost never another tool. It is one clear operating workflow with ownership.

If you run a team today, where is your biggest handoff failing right now?

candidates.why_fit: Ask operators to share their current bottleneck or handoff failure.
candidates.text:
Hot take for Founder/Owner: if your dashboard looks better than your close rate, your system is broken.

Topic: general_growth
Most teams optimize reporting before fixing execution.

What metric are you tracking that actually changes behavior this week?

candidates.why_fit: Ask operators to share their current bottleneck or handoff failure.
candidates.text:
Simple operator loop:
1) Identify one recurring revenue leak
2) Assign one owner
3) Define one measurable handoff
4) Review weekly

Applied to general_growth, this solves more than 90% of avoidable chaos.

Which step breaks first in your org?

candidates.business_pain: Teams deploy AI tools without a reliable operating workflow.
